utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Sorry I am late , but I left late .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So Pheebs , what is the book about ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I thought you said you read it in high school .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well yeah , but then I remembered I started it and there was this pep rally and I was , I was on top of the pyramid but anyway ... umm , what is this book about ?
